rationale: The citing paper appears to cite Sethuraman, Tellis, and Briesch (2011) only once when interpreting its estimated television advertising elasticity, stating that its value is in line with prior literature. This use is a benchmark/contextual comparison rather than a source of theory, modeling structure, identification strategy, or hypotheses in the paper. The core framework of the citing study is built on other works (e.g., awareness/choice-set and celebrity endorsement modeling), not on the cited meta-analysis.
